TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-anhi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

TRANSL.notes: "(One) goes to pick bamboo shoots, returns, and peels the skin off."

S.TRANSL: " goes to pick bamboo shoots, returns, and peels the skin off."

S.FORM: taleken aroma' pal'apehen sipahila aroma' ma pilosnawen.
S.PHON: taləkən aromaʔ palʔapəhən s~θipahila aromaʔ ma pilos~θnawən.
S.FORM: taleken aroma' pal'apehen sipahila aroma' ma pilosnawen.
S.PHON: taləkən aromaʔ palʔapəhən s~θipahila aromaʔ ma pilos~θnawən.

TRANSL.notes: 有一些曬乾,一些煮一煮(加熱).

S.TRANSL: 有一些曬乾,一些煮一煮 .

S.FORM: taleken aroma' ma hangraen ma' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: taləkən aromaʔ ma haŋræn maʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: taleken aroma' ma hangraen ma' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: taləkən aromaʔ ma haŋræn maʔ kajz~ðæh.

TRANSL.notes: "(After they are) dried, It is good to fry some too."

S.TRANSL: " dried, It is good to fry some too."

S.FORM: So pal pal'apehen sipahila So koSa kapahila 'aewhay ka kawaS intimoen sowiti' mwai' kayzaeh 'okik book.
S.PHON: ʃo pal palʔapəhən s~θipahila ʃo koʃa kapahila ʔæwhaj ka kawaʃ intimœn s~θowitiʔ mwaiʔ kajz~ðæh ʔokik βook.
S.FORM: So pal pal'apehen sipahila So koSa kapahila 'aewhay ka kawaS intimoen sowiti' mwai' kayzaeh 'okik book.
S.PHON: ʃo pal palʔapəhən s~θipahila ʃo koʃa kapahila ʔæwhaj ka kawaʃ intimœn s~θowitiʔ mwaiʔ kajz~ðæh ʔokik βook.

TRANSL.notes: 如果天氣好就曬乾.天氣不好就用一點鹽醃,這樣(竹筍)就不會腐爛壞掉.

S.TRANSL: 如果天氣好就曬乾.天氣不好就用一點鹽醃,這樣 就不會腐爛壞掉.

TRANSL.notes: "If the bamboo is dried when the weather is not good (not sunny), (it is advisable) to salten them a bit so they will not rot."

S.TRANSL: "If the bamboo is dried when the weather is not good , to salten them a bit so they will not rot."

S.FORM: haysani' 'alikaeh sowiti' ma' isaa So taleken ila kayzaeh ila mari'in taboeon ray hobos.
S.PHON: hajs~θaniʔ ʔalikæh s~θowitiʔ maʔ is~θaa ʃo taləkən ila kajz~ðæh ila mariʔin taβœon raj hoβos~θ.
S.FORM: haysani' 'alikaeh sowiti' ma' isaa So taleken ila kayzaeh ila mari'in taboeon ray hobos.
S.PHON: hajs~θaniʔ ʔalikæh s~θowitiʔ maʔ is~θaa ʃo taləkən ila kajz~ðæh ila mariʔin taβœon raj hoβos~θ.
S.TRANSL: 煮過的竹筍就裝在袋子裡.
"The bamboo shoots are heated and put in a container."

S.FORM: noka bato' kopiyaken kopiyak sipanpanibih kayzaeh 'alikah ka ralom raiw.
S.PHON: noka βatoʔ kopijakən kopijak s~θipanpaniβih kajz~ðæh ʔalikah ka ralom raiw.
S.FORM: noka bato' kopiyaken kopiyak sipanpanibih kayzaeh 'alikah ka ralom raiw.
S.PHON: noka βatoʔ kopijakən kopijak s~θipanpaniβih kajz~ðæh ʔalikah ka ralom raiw.
S.TRANSL: 用石頭壓,重複翻面,讓水分跑出來.
"They are turned around repeatedly using a stone to press water away."

S.FORM: mwai' min'itol 'aehae' hahila ma sipahila hayzaeh ka hahila 'aehae' ila So 'aboe' ka hahila 'aehae' ila ma 'ae'aeiw ila.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ minʔitol ʔæhæʔ hahila ma s~θipahila hajz~ðæh ka hahila ʔæhæʔ ila ʃo ʔaβœʔ ka hahila ʔæhæʔ ila ma ʔæʔæiw ila.
S.FORM: mwai' min'itol 'aehae' hahila ma sipahila hayzaeh ka hahila 'aehae' ila So 'aboe' ka hahila 'aehae' ila ma 'ae'aeiw ila.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ minʔitol ʔæhæʔ hahila ma s~θipahila hajz~ðæh ka hahila ʔæhæʔ ila ʃo ʔaβœʔ ka hahila ʔæhæʔ ila ma ʔæʔæiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 還有另一個方式,就是第二天當太陽昇起,可以把竹筍曬乾.
"There is another way, which is, the next day when the sun is up, one can go and dry up the bamboo shoots."
